name: socraticmind-services
description: Root package to run all microservices concurrently

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix auth" "npm run dev --prefix oauth" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix interview"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix auth" "npm start --prefix oauth" "npm start --prefix dashboard" "npm start --prefix interview"
